preconditions: User is unauthenticated and has not signed in
Application is accessed in guest state before login

testCases.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state from the approved entry URL
steps: Open the browser and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Wait for the Home page to finish loading
Observe the displayed Home page state before any login action
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page loads successfully at http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state with guest-accessible controls visible and no authenticated user state displayed.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home while unauthenticated
Locate the Person/Profile button on the Home page
Observe the button state without clicking it
testCases.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button is visible, enabled, clickable, and displayed as part of the Home page guest-state controls.

testCases.title: Verify Back button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Launch the application in guest state
Locate the Back button on the Home page
Observe the Back button state
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button is visible and enabled while the application remains in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Launch the application in guest state
Locate the Notification button on the Home page
Observe the Notification button state
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible and enabled while the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Home button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Launch the application in guest state
Locate the Home button on the Home page
Observe the Home button state
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button is visible and enabled while the application is in Home page guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Launch the application in guest state
Locate the Customer signup button
Observe the button state
testCases.expectedResult: The Customer signup button is visible, enabled, and available for guest access.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Launch the application in guest state
Locate the Clean survey button
Observe the button state
testCases.expectedResult: The Clean survey button is visible, enabled, and accessible to unauthenticated users.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Launch the application in guest state
Locate the Site survey button
Observe the button state
testCases.expectedResult: The Site survey button is visible, enabled, and accessible in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify navigation from Person/Profile button opens Login page or Login view
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home while unauthenticated
Click the Person/Profile button once
Observe the resulting application view
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from Home guest state to the Login page or Login view without authenticating the user.

testCases.title: Verify return to Home guest state after opening Login view from Person/Profile button
steps: Open the Login page or Login view using the Person/Profile button from Home guest state
Navigate back to the Home page using browser navigation or application navigation
Observe the Home page state after returning
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the same Home page guest state with guest controls visible and without displaying authenticated user controls.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button navigates to customer-search page
steps: Launch the application at http://localhost/washtabui/home while unauthenticated
Click the Customer signup button
Observe the destination page or SPA view
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home guest state to the customer-search page while the session remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button navigates to vehicle-survey page
steps: Launch the application at http://localhost/washtabui/home while unauthenticated
Click the Clean survey button
Observe the destination page or SPA view
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home guest state to the vehicle-survey page without requiring login.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button navigates to survey page
steps: Launch the application at http://localhost/washtabui/home while unauthenticated
Click the Site survey button
Observe the destination page or SPA view
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home guest state to the survey page while remaining in unauthenticated mode.

testCases.title: Verify Home button interaction preserves guest-state session
steps: Launch the application in guest state
Click the Home button
Observe the resulting page state
testCases.expectedResult: The application remains on or returns to the Home page guest state without authenticating the user or hiding guest controls.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button interaction does not expose authenticated functionality to guest users
steps: Launch the application in guest state
Click the Notification button
Observe any resulting behavior or displayed content
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button does not expose authenticated-only functionality and the application remains in guest-accessible state.

testCases.title: Verify Back button interaction does not incorrectly authenticate the guest user
steps: Launch the application in guest state
Click the Back button
Observe the resulting application state
testCases.expectedResult: The application does not enter an authenticated state and no logged-in user controls become visible after using the Back button.

testCases.title: Verify guest-accessible controls remain available after returning from customer-search page
steps: Navigate to the customer-search page using the Customer signup button
Return to the Home page guest state
Inspect the guest-state controls on the Home page
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page displays the Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, Home button, Customer signup button, Clean survey button, and Site survey button as visible and enabled after returning.

testCases.title: Verify guest-accessible controls remain available after returning from vehicle-survey page
steps: Navigate to the vehicle-survey page using the Clean survey button
Return to the Home page guest state
Inspect all guest-state controls
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page returns to guest state with all approved guest-accessible controls visible and enabled and without authenticated user indicators.

testCases.title: Verify guest-accessible controls remain available after returning from survey page
steps: Navigate to the survey page using the Site survey button
Return to the Home page guest state
Inspect the Home page controls
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page guest state is restored with approved guest controls accessible and authenticated-only controls still absent.
